content.json:
# Netskope Alerts & Events
---
Comprehensive monitoring of Netskope Alerts & Events ingested via Netskope Log Streaming into `NetskopeAlertEvents_CL`. Use the filters below to scope by time range, severity, and application. Sections cover alert volume and severity, application & Shadow IT activity, DLP incidents, malware & threat detections, policy enforcement, top users, device posture, network context, and geographic distribution.

parameters.name: Severity
parameters.label: Severity
parameters.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(Severity)
| distinct Severity = tolower(Severity)
| order by Severity asc

parameters.name: Application
parameters.label: Application
parameters.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(App)
| summarize Count = count() by App
| top 100 by Count
| project App
| order by App asc

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| where '*' in ({Application}) or App in ({Application})
| summarize ['Total Events']=count(), ['Total Alerts']=countif(Alert =~ 'yes'), ['High Severity']=countif(Alert =~ 'yes' and tolower(Severity) in ('high','critical')), ['DLP Incidents']=countif(AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpIncidentId)), ['Malware Detections']=countif(isnotempty(MalwareType) or AlertType =~ 'Malware'), ['Blocked Actions']=countif(Action =~ 'block'), ['Unique Users']=dcount(User), ['Unique Apps']=dcount(App)
| evaluate narrow()
| project Metric = Column, Value = tolong(Value)
content.title: Summary

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| where '*' in ({Application}) or App in ({Application})
| summarize Events = count(), Alerts = countif(Alert =~ 'yes') by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Events & Alerts Over Time

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Alert =~ 'yes'
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| summarize Alerts = count() by Severity = tolower(Severity)
| order by Alerts desc
content.title: Alerts by Severity

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Alert =~ 'yes'
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| where isnotempty(AlertType)
| summarize Alerts = count() by AlertType
| order by Alerts desc
| take 10
content.title: Alerts by Type

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Alert =~ 'yes'
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| summarize Alerts = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Severity = tolower(Severity)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Alerts Over Time by Severity

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Alert =~ 'yes'
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| where isnotempty(AlertName)
| summarize Count = count(), Users = dcount(User), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by AlertName, AlertType, Severity = tolower(Severity)
| order by Count desc
| take 25
content.title: Top Alerts

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Application}) or App in ({Application})
| where isnotempty(App) and App != '-'
| summarize Events = count() by App
| order by Events desc
| take 10
content.title: Events by Application (Top 10)

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Application}) or App in ({Application})
| where isnotempty(Appcategory) and Appcategory != '-'
| summarize Events = count() by Appcategory
| order by Events desc
| take 15
content.title: Events by Application Category

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Application}) or App in ({Application})
| where isnotempty(Activity) and Activity != '-'
| summarize Events = count() by Activity
| order by Events desc
| take 15
content.title: Top Activities

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Application}) or App in ({Application})
| where isnotempty(App) and App != '-'
| where tolower(Ccl) in ('low','poor') or Action =~ 'block'
| summarize Events = count(), Users = dcount(User), Blocked = countif(Action =~ 'block'), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by App, Appcategory, Ccl = tolower(Ccl)
| order by Events desc
| take 25
content.title: Risky / Low-Confidence Applications (Shadow IT)

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpIncidentId)
| summarize DLPIncidents = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: DLP Incidents Trend

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpProfile)
| where isnotempty(DlpProfile)
| summarize Incidents = count() by DlpProfile
| order by Incidents desc
| take 10
content.title: DLP Incidents by Profile

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpIncidentId)
| summarize Incidents = count(), DistinctIncidents = dcount(DlpIncidentId), Profiles = make_set(DlpProfile, 10), Apps = make_set(App, 10), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by User
| order by Incidents desc
| take 20
content.title: Top DLP Users

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpIncidentId)
| where isnotempty(DlpRule)
| summarize Incidents = count(), Files = dcount(DlpFile) by DlpRule, DlpRuleSeverity
| order by Incidents desc
| take 20
content.title: DLP Incidents by Rule

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MalwareType) or AlertType =~ 'Malware' or isnotempty(ThreatType)
| summarize Detections = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Threat Detections Over Time

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MalwareType)
| summarize Detections = count() by MalwareType
| order by Detections desc
| take 10
content.title: Detections by Malware Type

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MalwareType) or AlertType =~ 'Malware'
| summarize Detections = count(), Users = dcount(User), Engines = make_set(DetectionEngine, 5), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by MalwareType, MalwareSeverity, ThreatType
| order by Detections desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Malware / Threat Detections

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(Action)
| summarize Events = count() by Action = tolower(Action)
| order by Events desc
content.title: Actions Breakdown

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Action =~ 'block'
| summarize Blocked = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Blocked Events Over Time

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(Policy) and Policy != '-'
| summarize Events = count(), Blocked = countif(Action =~ 'block'), Users = dcount(User) by Policy
| order by Events desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Policies

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| where isnotempty(User) and User != '-'
| summarize Events = count(), Alerts = countif(Alert =~ 'yes'), HighSev = countif(Alert =~ 'yes' and tolower(Severity) in ('high','critical')), DLP = countif(AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpIncidentId)), Apps = dcount(App) by User
| order by Events desc
| take 25
content.title: Top Users

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Alert =~ 'yes' and tolower(Severity) in ('high','critical')
| where isnotempty(User) and User != '-'
| summarize HighSeverityAlerts = count() by User
| order by HighSeverityAlerts desc
| take 10
content.title: Top Users by High-Severity Alerts

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(DeviceClassification)
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceClassification
| order by Events desc
content.title: Events by Device Classification

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(Os)
| summarize Events = count() by Os
| order by Events desc
| take 10
content.title: Events by Operating System

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(AccessMethod)
| summarize Events = count() by AccessMethod
| order by Events desc
content.title: Events by Access Method

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| where '*' in ({Application}) or App in ({Application})
| where isnotempty(User) and User != '-'
| summarize Events = count(), Alerts = countif(Alert =~ 'yes'),
    High = countif(Alert =~ 'yes' and tolower(Severity) in ('high','critical')),
    DLP = countif(AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpIncidentId)),
    Malware = countif(isnotempty(MalwareType) or AlertType =~ 'Malware'),
    Blocked = countif(Action =~ 'block'),
    RiskyApps = dcountif(App, tolower(Ccl) in ('low','poor')),
    Countries = dcount(SrcCountry) by User
| extend RiskScore = High*5 + Malware*5 + DLP*3 + Blocked*1 + RiskyApps*2 + iff(Countries > 1, (Countries-1)*2, 0)
| where RiskScore > 0
| top 20 by RiskScore desc
content.title: User Risk Scoreboard

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Alert =~ 'yes'
| where '*' in ({Severity}) or tolower(Severity) in ({Severity})
| extend H = hourofday(TimeGenerated), D = toint(dayofweek(TimeGenerated) / 1d)
| extend Day = case(D==0,'0 Sun',D==1,'1 Mon',D==2,'2 Tue',D==3,'3 Wed',D==4,'4 Thu',D==5,'5 Fri','6 Sat')
| summarize Count = count() by Day, H
| evaluate pivot(H, sum(Count), Day)
| sort by Day asc
content.title: Alert Heatmap by Day & Hour (UTC)

content.json:
## User Investigation
Click a user in the table below to load their activity in the panels underneath.

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(User) and User != '-'
| summarize Events = count(), Alerts = countif(Alert =~ 'yes'), DLP = countif(AlertType =~ 'DLP' or isnotempty(DlpIncidentId)), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by User
| order by Alerts desc, Events desc
| take 50
content.title: Select a user to investigate

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where User == '{SelectedUser}'
| summarize Events = count(), Alerts = countif(Alert =~ 'yes') by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Activity timeline for {SelectedUser}

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where User == '{SelectedUser}'
| where isnotempty(App)
| summarize Events = count(), Blocked = countif(Action =~ 'block') by App, Ccl = tolower(Ccl)
| order by Events desc
| take 15
content.title: Top applications for {SelectedUser}

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where User == '{SelectedUser}'
| where Alert =~ 'yes'
| project TimeGenerated, Severity = tolower(Severity), AlertName, AlertType, App, Action, Policy, Userip, SrcCountry
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent alerts for {SelectedUser}

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(SrcCountry) and SrcCountry != '-'
| summarize Events = count(), Alerts = countif(Alert =~ 'yes') by SrcCountry
| order by Events desc
| take 20
content.title: Activity by Source Country

content.query:
NetskopeAlertEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(SrcCountry) and SrcCountry != '-'
| where isnotempty(SrcLatitude) and isnotempty(SrcLongitude)
| summarize Events = count() by SrcCountry, SrcLatitude, SrcLongitude
| order by Events desc
content.title: Geo Map (Source)
